ideation: This animation sequence aims to depict a protective and encompassing gesture, reflecting the familial bond represented by the emoji.  The animation will focus on the robot's arms creating a gentle, enclosing space.  I will use both arms to form a cradle-like shape, suggesting care and security. The movement will be slow and deliberate to emphasize the emotion.  The robot will not be performing any actions; the focus is solely on the posture. In frame one, both arms are extended slightly outward, palms up. The arms are positioned to create a welcoming space. In frame two, the arms start to curve inward, bringing the palms closer together as if gently cradling something precious. In frame three, the arms almost meet, creating a secure, protective space. In frame four, the arms slightly relax, maintaining the gentle embrace, but less tightly. This suggests a balance between protection and openness.  In frame five, the arms return to a slightly more open position, but still conveying warmth and care. This allows for a sense of continuity and readiness for interaction.

frames.beat: arms open slightly, palms up, a welcoming space
arms curve inward, gently cradling something precious
arms embrace closely, forming a secure, protective space
arms relax slightly, maintaining the gentle embrace
arms open again, conveying warmth and care
